title: Classic Soy Glaze
description: A balanced, glossy soy glaze with three ingredients. Salty-sweet with a clean shine. Keeps for two weeks refrigerated and works on salmon, chicken, roasted vegetables, and more.

instructions.text: Combine soy sauce, brown sugar or honey, and rice vinegar in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Bring to a simmer, then reduce heat and gently simmer 5–8 minutes, stirring occasionally, until thickened to a glossy glaze.
Remove from heat — it will thicken more as it cools. Use immediately or refrigerate.

notes:
Too thin? Keep simmering. Too thick? Add 1–2 tsp water. Want extra shine? Whisk in half a teaspoon of butter at the end.

Keeps refrigerated for up to 2 weeks. Works on salmon, chicken thighs, roasted vegetables, or as a dipping sauce.
